name: ABB Robot Virtual Control
description: Virtual ABB control plugin for OpenClaw 3D viewer workflows over ws-bridge.

wsBridgePort.label: WS Bridge Port
wsBridgePort.help: WebSocket bridge port for virtual viewer control (default: 9877).

defaultRobot.label: Default Virtual Robot
defaultRobot.help: Robot id used when robot_id is omitted.

wsBridgePort.description: WebSocket bridge port for virtual viewer (default: 9877)

defaultRobot.description: Virtual robot id for viewer registration
